info.name: WP Super Gallery — Full API Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the WP Super Gallery REST API.

Environment variables required:
- baseUrl (e.g. https://example.com)
- username
- password
- wpsg_nonce (auto-captured from login)
- campaign_id
- media_id
- user_id
- token
- template_id
- overlay_id
- font_id
- company_id

Pre-request script at collection level injects X-WP-Nonce when available.

item.name: List Campaigns — P28-E Filters (category + tag + sort + include_archived + template_id)

query.description: Required. Must be true to confirm permanent deletion.
Optional. When true, also deletes all analytics events for this campaign.

request.description: P28-J: Returns grant counts and pending request counts for every campaign.

query.description: P28-B: Show grants whose expires_at is in the past
Raw 64-char hex magic key from the admin notification email (TTL 48h, single-use).

request.description: One-click approval link embedded in the admin notification email. No session required — validated by the magic key alone. Redirects to the configured landing page on success or failure.
Create a new campaign category term.
Rename an existing campaign category. Set {{category_id}} to the term ID.
Delete a campaign category. Campaigns lose this category assignment. Set {{category_id}} to the term ID.
Create a new campaign tag term.
Delete a campaign tag. Set {{tag_id}} to the term ID.
Create a new media tag term.
Delete a media tag. Set {{tag_id}} to the term ID.
